problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 24 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
